name: Governance ambiguity
description: Approval/RACI/ownership problems should classify as `governance`. Brand voice drift should be cross-cutting `brand`.

problems.text: Nobody knows who owns the customer record once a deal closes — Sales says CRM, CRM says Service.
Personalisation campaigns sit in a 6-week legal review before any A/B test can launch.
Our brand voice swings between corporate-formal in email and meme-casual on Instagram, with no editorial standard.

journeyPhases.label: Discover
journeyPhases.description: Customer becomes aware of category and starts gathering options.

journeyPhases.label: Consider
journeyPhases.description: Customer evaluates two or three contenders and forms purchase criteria.
journeyPhases.trigger: Visits comparison content or pricing page

journeyPhases.label: Purchase
journeyPhases.trigger: Adds to cart or starts checkout flow
